q: What is defined as a metallic conductor system capable of radiating and capturing electromagnetic energy into or from free space?

q: In which direction is the maximum radiation concentrated in a broadside array?

q: In which direction is the maximum radiation concentrated in an end-fire array?
a: Perpendicular to the line of the array

b: It increases the electrical length and increases radiation resistance
